zh.lifeSummary: 當Rudolf von Bregenz-Pfullendorf於1100年出生在奧地利沃拉爾格布雷根茨布雷根茨時，他的父親Ulrich Bregenz-Pfullendorf30歲，母親Adelheid von Bregenz20歲。他和Elisabeth av Spoleto Von Ravensburg-Bechte至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1181年1月9日在義大利隆巴迪亞帕維亞享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rudolf von Bregenz-Pfullendorf于1100年出生在奥地利沃拉爾格布雷根茨布雷根茨时，他的父亲Ulrich Bregenz-Pfullendorf30岁，母亲Adelheid von Bregenz20岁。他和Elisabeth av Spoleto Von Ravensburg-Bechte至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1181年1月9日在意大利隆巴迪亞帕維亞享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Rudolf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Latinized version, Rudolphus, of the Germanic name Hrōdwulf ( see Rolf ). It was introduced to the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century. Rudolf was a hereditary name among the Habsburgs, the Holy Roman Emperors and rulers of Austria, from the Emperor Rudolf I ( 1218–91 ) to the Archduke Rudolf , Crown Prince of Austria-Hungary, who died in mysterious circumstances at his country house at Meyerling in 1889 . Rudolf Rassendyll was the central character of Anthony Hope's adventure stories The Prisoner of Zenda ( 1894 ) and Rupert of Hentzau ( 1898 ), in which he is an English gentleman who bears a great physical resemblance to the King of Ruritania, to whom he is distantly related. He successfully impersonates the king for reasons of state. In the early 20th century the popularity of this name was further enhanced by the American silent-film actor Rudolph Valentino ( 1895–1926 ), born in Italy as Rodolfo di Valentina d'Antonguolla . It has not been used much in recent times, perhaps being inextricably associated with ‘the red-nosed reindeer’ of the Christmas song.

variants.name: Rudolph
meanings: From a Latinized version, Rudolphus, of the Germanic name Hrōdwulf ( see Rolf ). It was introduced to the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century. Rudolf was a hereditary name among the Habsburgs, the Holy Roman Emperors and rulers of Austria, from the Emperor Rudolf I ( 1218–91 ) to the Archduke Rudolf , Crown Prince of Austria-Hungary, who died in mysterious circumstances at his country house at Meyerling in 1889 . Rudolf Rassendyll was the central character of Anthony Hope's adventure stories The Prisoner of Zenda ( 1894 ) and Rupert of Hentzau ( 1898 ), in which he is an English gentleman who bears a great physical resemblance to the King of Ruritania, to whom he is distantly related. He successfully impersonates the king for reasons of state. In the early 20th century the popularity of this name was further enhanced by the American silent-film actor Rudolph Valentino ( 1895–1926 ), born in Italy as Rodolfo di Valentina d'Antonguolla . It has not been used much in recent times, perhaps being inextricably associated with ‘the red-nosed reindeer’ of the Christmas song.

en.lifeSummary: When Rudolf von Bregenz-Pfullendorf was born in 1100, in Bregenz, Bregenz, Vorarlberg, Austria, his father, Ulrich Bregenz-Pfullendorf, was 30 and his mother, Adelheid von Bregenz, was 20. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Elisabeth av Spoleto Von Ravensburg-Bechte. He died on 9 January 1181, in Pavia, Lombardy, Italy, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rudolf von Bregenz-Pfullendorf est né en 1100, à Bregenz, Bregenz, Vorarlberg, Autriche, son père, Ulrich Bregenz-Pfullendorf, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Bregenz, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Elisabeth av Spoleto Von Ravensburg-Bechte. Il est décédé le 9 janvier 1181, à Pavia, Lombardia, Italie, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rudolf von Bregenz-Pfullendorf 1100 in Bregenz, Bregenz, Vorarlberg, Österreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ulrich Bregenz-Pfullendorf 30 und seine Mutter Adelheid von Bregenz 20. Er hatte mit Elisabeth av Spoleto Von Ravensburg-Bechte mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. Januar 1181 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Pavia, Lombardei, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rudolf von Bregenz-Pfullendorf è nato il nel 1100 nel Bregenz, Bregenz, Vorarlberg, Austria, il suo padre, Ulrich Bregenz-Pfullendorf, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid von Bregenz, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Elisabeth av Spoleto Von Ravensburg-Bechte. Morì il 9 gennaio 1181, nel Pavia, Lombardia, Italia, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rudolf von Bregenz-Pfullendorfが1100年にオーストリアボラルルバーグブレジェンズブレジェンズで生まれた時，父Ulrich Bregenz-Pfullendorfは30歳，母Adelheid von Bregenzは20歳であった。彼はElisabeth av Spoleto Von Ravensburg-Bechteとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1181年1月9日にイタリアロンバーディアプアヴィアで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rudolf von Bregenz-Pfullendorf(이)가 1100년 오스트리아 보라를버그 브레겐즈 브레겐즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ulrich Bregenz-Pfullendorf(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid von Bregenz(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Elisabeth av Spoleto Von Ravensburg-Bechte(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1181년 1월 9일 이탈리아 롬바디아 파비아에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rudolf von Bregenz-Pfullendorf nasceu em 1100, em Bregenz, Bregenz, Vorarlberg, Áustria, seu pai, Ulrich Bregenz-Pfullendorf, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Bregenz, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Elisabeth av Spoleto Von Ravensburg-Bechte. Ele faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1181, em Pavia, Lombardia, Itália, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rudolf von Bregenz-Pfullendorf родился в 1100 г. в местности бредженц, бредженц, форарлбирг, Австрия, его отцу по имени Ulrich Bregenz-Pfullendorf было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Bregenz, 20. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Elisabeth av Spoleto Von Ravensburg-Bechte. Он умер 9 января 1181 г. в местности павя, ломбардя, Италия в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rudolf von Bregenz-Pfullendorf nació en 1100, en Bregenz, Bregenz, Vorarlberg, Austria, su papá, Ulrich Bregenz-Pfullendorf, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Adelheid von Bregenz, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Elisabeth av Spoleto Von Ravensburg-Bechte. Murió el 9 de enero de 1181, en Pavia, Lombardia, Italia, a la edad de 81 años.
